title: Solana DEX Trade History
description: Decode all swap transactions for any Solana wallet via GoldRush's transaction decoder on `solana-mainnet` — automatically identifies and extracts trades from Jupiter, Raydium, Orca, and Meteora instructions. Each decoded trade returns: input token + amount, output token + amount, USD value at trade time, DEX used, and tx signature. Returns a clean trade-by-trade list with zero raw instruction parsing. Build a full Solana trading journal, PnL calculator, or strategy performance analyzer.
